notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler strikes out swinging. James Outman scores. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd. Kevin McGonigle steals (10) 2nd base. James Outman scores. Throwing error by catcher Yainer Diaz.

notableEvents.label: Riley Greene GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Riley Greene grounds into a double play, first baseman Christian Walker to shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Christian Walker. Dillon Dingler out at 2nd. Riley Greene out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler grounds into a double play, first baseman Christian Walker to second baseman Jose Altuve to pitcher Nate Pearson. Kevin McGonigle out at 2nd. Dillon Dingler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jose Altuve GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve grounds into a double play, shortstop Kevin McGonigle to second baseman Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Christian Walker out at 2nd. Jose Altuve out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler strikes out swinging. James Outman scores. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd. Kevin McGonigle steals (10) 2nd base. James Outman scores. Throwing error by catcher Yainer Diaz.

notableEvents.label: Yainer Diaz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tigers challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Yainer Diaz grounds into a double play, second baseman Zach McKinstry to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Jose Altuve out at 2nd. Yainer Diaz out at 1st.
